release_notes: HOTFIX — 0.3.90 over-tightened the Windows liveness check. spawn() returned a PID instantly, but tasklist did not yet report chrome.exe under that PID for several seconds (cyrillic user-data-dir + proxy-auth extension + cold start). The poller saw "PID exists but isn't chrome.exe" and killed the tracker record at the ~9s mark, even though the real browser was running. UI cleared the running indicator and the next play tried to spawn a second instance — Chromium's named mutex held the original one and no new window appeared. Fix: probeWindows returns three states (chrome / pid-only / dead); during the first 30s after spawn 'pid-only' is treated as alive (Chrome is still booting). After 30s only confirmed chrome.exe counts, so PID-reuse after exit still resolves as dead.
